title: OrderPlaced
description: Published when a customer successfully places an order. This event initiates the place-order saga.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance (UUID v7, time-ordered)

eventType.description: Discriminator for event routing and deserialization

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Increment on breaking changes; bump minor on additive changes.

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the domain event occurred

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the Order aggregate (UUID v7)

customerId.description: Identifier of the Customer who placed the order

items.description: Order line items. Must have at least one item (see INV-ORD-001).

orderItemId.description: Unique identifier for this line item

quantity.description: Quantity ordered. Must be a positive integer (see INV-ORD-002).

unitPriceCents.description: Unit price in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD)

totalAmountCents.description: Order total in smallest currency unit. Must equal sum(item.quantity * item.unitPriceCents) (see INV-ORD-006).

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP)

shippingAddressId.description: Reference to the Customer's address record at time of placement. Optional for digital goods.

idempotencyKey.description: Client-provided idempotency key. Stored to enable safe retries.
